---
name: 🔌 Integration request
about: Ask for a Pump Up integration with an agent framework or tool
title: "Integration: <framework>"
labels: integration-request
assignees: ""
---

Tell us where you're building — this directly shapes what we ship next. 🔌

**Which framework or tool?**
Name it, with a link (e.g. LangGraph, n8n, your-favourite-framework).

**How do you build with it today?**
A little about your setup — language, scale, what the agent does.

**Where's the human-in-the-loop touchpoint?**
The spot in your agent's workflow where a person needs to approve / route / decide.

**Anything else?**
Links, docs, or examples that would help us build the right thing.
